name: Basic Oat Bran Muffins
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup AM Whole Wheat Pastry Flour
3/4 cup Soymilk, skim milk or water
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients in one bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the liquid ingredients.
3. Combine the wet and dry mixtures thoroughly.
4. Fill 6 to 8 oiled muffin tins about three-quarters full.
5. Bake at 375°F for 12 to 15 minutes. Mini-muffins will rise better than regular muffins.
